role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market conditions, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in instruments with economic characteristics similar to U.S. large cap equity securities. Specifically, the manager intends to invest substantially all of the fund's assets in FLexible EXchange Options ("FLEX Options") that reference the Underlying ETF. The fund is non-diversified.
